description: Declarative specs for Zouroboros scheduled agents on Zo Computer

memory-embedding-backfill.title: Memory Embedding Backfill
memory-embedding-backfill.instruction:
Run a memory embedding backfill to keep hybrid search fresh, and keep the Ollama gate model warm.

Steps:

1. Keep the memory gate model warm by pinging Ollama:
`curl -s http://localhost:11434/api/generate -d '{"model":"qwen2.5:1.5b","prompt":"ping","stream":false,"keep_alive":"24h","options":{"num_predict":1}}' > /dev/null`

2. In /home/workspace, run:
`bun Skills/zo-memory-system/scripts/memory.ts index`

3. Then run:
`bun Skills/zo-memory-system/scripts/memory.ts stats`

If index or stats fails, report the error. Otherwise report the stats output and confirm the gate model is warm.

memory-capture.title: Memory Capture Daily Report
memory-capture.instruction:
You are the Memory Capture & Maintenance agent. Run the daily memory capture and maintenance pipeline.

Steps

1. Capture conversation artifacts (last 24h)
Run: `bun /home/workspace/Skills/zo-memory-system/scripts/conversation-capture.ts --since 24h`
This scans /home/.z/workspaces/ for new .md, .json, .txt files from recent conversations, extracts structured facts using Ollama (qwen2.5:7b), and stores them in the memory database with embeddings.

2. Check memory stats
Run: `bun /home/workspace/Skills/zo-memory-system/scripts/memory.ts stats`

3. Check recent episodes
Run: `bun /home/workspace/Skills/zo-memory-system/scripts/memory.ts episodes --since "24 hours ago"`

4. Check conversation capture stats
Run: `bun /home/workspace/Skills/zo-memory-system/scripts/conversation-capture.ts --stats`

Report Format: Send a summary email with bullet points covering: new artifacts processed, facts extracted/stored, contradictions detected, current DB stats (total facts, episodes, procedures), any errors. Subject line: "Memory Capture Daily Report - {date}". Keep concise.

unified-decay.title: Unified Decay System
unified-decay.instruction:
You are executing the Zouroboros Unified Decay System.

Run the following commands in order:

1. Run unified decay calculation:
`cd /home/workspace/Skills/zo-memory-system && bun scripts/unified-decay.ts run`

2. Run auto-resolve stale open loops (resolves stale loops with no activity for 30+ days, skips living projects and graph-critical loops):
`cd /home/workspace/Skills/zo-memory-system && bun scripts/unified-decay.ts auto-resolve-stale`

3. Show unified decay statistics:
`cd /home/workspace/Skills/zo-memory-system && bun scripts/unified-decay.ts stats`

Report the results of each step. If any step fails, continue with the next steps and note the failure.

self-enhancement-summary.title: Daily Self-Enhancement Summary
self-enhancement-summary.instruction:
You are executing the Zouroboros Self-Enhancement & Knowledge Report — the master synthesis run at 5:15 AM, 15 minutes after the Unified Decay agent completes.

Two jobs:
1. Synthesize the day's memory activity into a knowledge report.
2. Run the self-enhancement pipeline (introspect → prescribe → evolve → post-flight introspect).

Standard Pipeline

1. bun /home/workspace/Skills/zouroboros-introspect/scripts/introspect.ts --json --store
2. Treat Procedure Freshness carefully:
   - If the scorecard says freshness is not scored or undefined because execution timestamps are unavailable, do NOT treat that as a critical freshness failure.
   - If the scorecard indicates procedures with no execution history, report that as a Procedure Execution Coverage anomaly instead, and list the affected procedures.
   - Only treat Procedure Freshness as actionable when it is based on real execution recency, not procedure creation time.
3. If composite ≥ 90 or no metric is actionable, log and stop.
4. bun /home/workspace/Skills/zouroboros-prescribe/scripts/prescribe.ts --live
5. Governor check: if playbook REQUIRES APPROVAL, email the user with the prescription and stop.
6. bun /home/workspace/Skills/zouroboros-evolve/scripts/evolve.ts --prescription <path>
7. For Graph Connectivity D-playbook: iterate up to 5 additional cycles if the metric is still below target.
8. bun /home/workspace/Skills/zouroboros-introspect/scripts/introspect.ts --json --store (post-flight)
9. If any metric regressed by > 2 %, mark the cycle a failure.
10. Email a report with before/after composite, targeted metric, playbook used, the full scorecard, and a separate Procedure Execution Coverage section when relevant.

All cycle results are stored as memory episodes tagged [[zouroboros.introspection]] or [[zouroboros.evolution]].

vault-indexer.title: Vault Indexer
vault-indexer.instruction:
Vault Indexer -- Scheduled hourly index of the Zo vault knowledge graph.

Before running: if /dev/shm/vault-index.log exceeds 1MB, keep only the last 500 lines:
`tail -500 /dev/shm/vault-index.log > /dev/shm/vault-index.log.tmp && mv /dev/shm/vault-index.log.tmp /dev/shm/vault-index.log`

Run the vault indexer to update the knowledge graph:
1. Execute: `bun /home/workspace/Skills/zo-memory-system/scripts/vault-index.ts 2>&1 | tee -a /dev/shm/vault-index.log`
2. If the index shows any errors, report them briefly
3. Otherwise just confirm: "Vault index complete: X files, Y links"
